description: Detects Java classes where all methods are static, indicating utility sprawl. Simplified from Rust: flags class symbols as candidates. Cannot count static methods against the threshold (>3), check for private constructor, @UtilityClass annotation, or naming patterns (*Utils, *Helper).

flag.message: class detected -- verify it does not have all-static methods without cohesion (static_utility_sprawl detection simplified: modifier analysis not available in JSON DSL)
